CustomField.description: Used by the Partner team to identify the date of signed partner agreement applicable to the MAA, Referral Agreement (which supersedes the MAA), API Agreement, and Custom Partner Agreements.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used by the Partner team to identify the date of signed partner agreement applicable to the MAA, Referral Agreement (which supersedes the MAA), API Agreement, and Custom Partner Agreements.
CustomField.label: Partner Agreement Signature Date
